Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class LightningComponentBundle

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.LightningComponentBundle
public class LightningComponentBundle extends Metadata

Java class for LightningComponentBundle complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="LightningComponentBundle">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="apiVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="capabilities" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Capabilities" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isExplicitImport" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isExposed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lwcResources" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}LwcResources" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="runtimeNamespace" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetConfigs" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}base64Binary" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targets" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Targets" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
